title: Stairs Recycle
name: stairs_recycle
short_description: Turn stairs into slabs, different stairs, or back into blocks. Smelt cobble stairs into stone stairs. Highly recommended for Oneblock survival.
long_description: Adds recipes to recycle stairs. Inner stairs can be crafted into normal stairs. Outer stairs can be crafted into slabs. Normal stairs can be crafted into outer stairs. Special thanks to Bob64 aka DustyBagel for debugging version 0.3.0. All content contained within is licensed under GNU Lesser General Public License version 3.0 or later.
